items.title: [100 Mile Free Press] Mieke Reelick
items.content_html: We are saddened to announce the passing of Mieke Reelick on 7 March 2026. A devoted mother and a valued member of the 100 Mile House community. Born in The Hague, Netherlands, in 1942, she later made Canada her home, where she raised her son Armand (Elicia) and daughter Nicole.
